nasb.text: but I have hated Esau, and I have made his mountains a desolation and appointed his inheritance for the jackals of the wilderness.”

esv.text: but Esau I have hated. I have laid waste his hill country and left his heritage to jackals of the desert.”

cnv.text: 惡以掃。我使以掃的山地荒涼，把他的產業給了曠野的豺狼。”

ccb.text: 厌恶以扫。我使以扫的山岭荒凉，把他的地业留给旷野的豺狼。”

csbs.text: 恨以扫；我使以扫的山地变得荒凉，把他的继业给旷野的豺狗。”
